reference: Hello! I am twenty-nine years old and generally very healthy. I do not work out but I am fit. I am five feet seven inches tall and weigh one hundred and seventeen pounds. I have recently been experiencing lower rib pain where I feel pressure, which makes it hard to breathe. It is so severe that the next day my ribs are sore. I am also feeling very dizzy and foggy. I have had an X-ray done, which came back clear for any fractures or issues in the lungs. I am waiting on blood test results, but I am guessing they will be negative as well. Help! What is this?! I am in pain now and I constantly feel dizzy and tired.
text: Hello. I am 29 years old and generally healthy. I do not work out, but I am fit. I am 5 feet 7 inches. And weigh 117 pounds. I have recently been experiencing lower rib pain where I feel pressure, which makes it hard to breathe. It is so severe that the next day my ribs are sore. I am also feeling very dizzy and foggy. I have had an X-ray done, which came back clear for any fractures or issues in the lungs. I am waiting on blood test results, but I am guessing they will be negative as well. Help, what is this? I am in pain now, and I constantly feel dizzy and tired.
